answers: Intermittent fasting (IF): cycle between eating and fasting periods. Popular: 16:8 (eat 8 hours, fast 16 hours).
Benefits: weight loss, improved insulin sensitivity, cellular repair (autophagy), and mental clarity. Not a diet — it's when you eat.
16:8 method: skip breakfast, eat from 12pm-8pm, fast overnight. Start with 12:12 and gradually extend the fasting window.
IF tips: drink water, black coffee, or tea during fasting. Break fast with protein-rich meal. Don't overeat in eating window.
